employeePhoneScripts.arVerification: Hello, this is the billing office at New Ridge Family Dental. May I speak with {patientName}? I need to verify your identity before discussing account details.
employeePhoneScripts.arBalance: Our records show a balance of {balance}. Would you like to pay today, or discuss a payment plan?
employeePhoneScripts.appointmentConfirm: This is a reminder call from New Ridge Family Dental regarding your upcoming appointment.
employeePhoneScripts.hipaaClose: For your privacy, I cannot leave detailed financial information on voicemail. Please call us back at the office number.

policy: HAL voice uses these templates only — no PHI in outbound TTS without staff confirmation.
